001import java.util.HashMap;
002
003/**
004 * Stores a private collection of items keyed by name.
005 *
006 * The internal collection is fully encapsulated and cannot be manipulated
007 * directly
008 * from outside this class.
009 *
010 * @author Barnabe Jouanard
011 * @version 2026.04.13
012 */
013public class ItemList {
014    /** Internal storage keyed by item name. */
015    private HashMap<String, Item> aItems;
016
017    /**
018     * Creates an empty item list.
019     */
020    public ItemList() {
021        this.aItems = new HashMap<String, Item>();
022    }
023
024    /**
025     * Returns the item associated with the given name, or {@code null}.
026     *
027     * @param pName the lookup key
028     * @return the matching {@link Item}, or {@code null}
029     */
030    public Item getItem(final String pName) {
031        return this.aItems.get(pName);
032    }
033
034    /**
035     * Adds or replaces an item under the given key.
036     *
037     * @param pName short identifier used for later retrieval
038     * @param pItem the {@link Item} to store
039     */
040    public void addItem(final String pName, final Item pItem) {
041        this.aItems.put(pName, pItem);
042    }
043
044    /**
045     * Removes the item associated with the given key.
046     *
047     * @param pName the lookup key
048     */
049    public void removeItem(final String pName) {
050        this.aItems.remove(pName);
051    }
052
053    /**
054     * Checks whether this item list contains no elements.
055     *
056     * @return {@code true} when no items are stored
057     */
058    public boolean isEmpty() {
059        return this.aItems.isEmpty();
060    }
061
062    /**
063     * Builds a multi-line string with each item's description,
064     * or a default notice when the list is empty.
065     *
066     * @return formatted item descriptions
067     */
068    public String getItemsDescription() {
069        if (this.aItems.isEmpty()) {
070            return "There are no items here!";
071        }
072        String vResult = "";
073        for (String vName : this.aItems.keySet()) {
074            vResult += this.aItems.get(vName).getItemDescription() + "\n";
075        }
076        return vResult;
077    }
078
079    /**
080     * Builds an inventory summary listing all item keys and the total value.
081     *
082     * @return formatted inventory text suitable for printing to the UI
083     */
084    public String getItemList() {
085        if (this.aItems.isEmpty()) {
086            return "You don't have any items!";
087        }
088        String vResult = "Your items: ";
089        int vInventoryPrice = 0;
090        for (String vItem : this.aItems.keySet()) {
091            vResult += " " + vItem;
092            vInventoryPrice += this.aItems.get(vItem).getItemPrice();
093        }
094        vResult += "\n\nTotal value: " + vInventoryPrice;
095        return vResult;
096    }
097} // ItemList
